profile.title: Profile
profile.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?

⚠️ This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

• Your personal information will be removed
• Your order history will be retained for audit purposes
• You will be logged out immediately
profile.accountDeletedMessage: Your account has been successfully deleted. You will be redirected to the login screen.
profile.deletionFailedMessage: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

home.tip1: Recycling one aluminum can saves enough energy to run a TV for 3 hours.
home.tip2: The U.S. throws away $11.4 billion worth of recyclable containers and packaging every year.
home.tip3: Recycling plastic saves twice as much energy as burning it in an incinerator.
home.tip4: Around 1 billion trees worth of paper are thrown away every year in the U.S.
home.tip5: Glass is 100% recyclable and can be recycled endlessly without loss in quality or purity.
home.referSubtitle: Share with friends and earn ₹10 per referral!
home.impactMessage: You've helped save {{trees}} trees and reduced {{co2}}kg CO₂ emissions this year!

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional services for all your needs

demolition.step1: Book your service and we'll contact you for details.
demolition.step2: Our team visits for a final assessment and quote.
demolition.step3: We complete the service professionally and safely.
demolition.step4: The site is cleaned and waste is disposed of responsibly.

dismantling.step1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your project.
dismantling.step2: Receive a detailed dismantling plan and quote.
dismantling.step3: Our certified engineers perform the dismantling.
dismantling.step4: Materials are processed for scrap or resale.

paperShredding.included1: Secure collection of documents in locked bins.
paperShredding.included2: On-site or off-site shredding options available.
paperShredding.included3: A Certificate of Destruction is provided for compliance.
paperShredding.step1: Choose a one-time purge or a regular schedule.
paperShredding.step2: We deliver secure bins to your location.
paperShredding.step3: Our trained staff collect and shred your documents.
paperShredding.step4: You receive a certificate confirming destruction.

societyTieup.included1: Dedicated bins for paper, plastic, and metal.
societyTieup.included5: Awareness programs for residents on segregation.
societyTieup.step1: The society committee contacts us to partner up.
societyTieup.step2: We set up a dedicated scrap collection corner.
societyTieup.step3: Residents drop their segregated scrap anytime.
societyTieup.step4: We collect, weigh, and pay the society monthly.

junkRemoval.included1: Removal of furniture, appliances, and electronics.
junkRemoval.included2: Household, office, and construction debris clearance.
junkRemoval.included4: Includes all labor for lifting and loading.
junkRemoval.step1: Send a photo or list of items for a quick quote.
junkRemoval.step3: Our team arrives and quickly removes your junk.
junkRemoval.step4: We sweep the area clean before leaving.
